content.description: Fixed artifact-cli/exclusive-access invariant: on_stop.sh and on_pre_compact.sh now pipe artifact JSON through bin/artifact.sh store instead of writing directly to disk. Created bin/artifact-jsonl-path.sh helper to abstract the staged-transcript JSONL companion path, and updated scribe-all.sh to use the helper instead of hardcoding the storage path STAGED_TRANSCRIPT_DIR.
